recommendations.title: The Ministry of Ungentlemanly Warfare

recommendations.title: Kesari
recommendations.overview: In 1897, an army of 21 Sikhs battles 10,000 Afghans to prevent the Saragarhi Fort from being taken down.

recommendations.title: Primitive War
recommendations.overview: During the Vietnam War, a recon unit ventures to an isolated jungle valley to uncover the fate of a missing platoon. They soon find themselves in a fight for their lives against an unexpected enemy — prehistoric dinosaurs.

recommendations.title: 12 Strong
recommendations.overview: A team of special forces head into Afghanistan in the aftermath of the September 11th attacks in an attempt to dismantle the Taliban.

recommendations.title: The Objective

recommendations.title: Shock Waves
recommendations.overview: Visitors to a remote island discover that a reclusive Nazi commandant has been breeding a group of zombie soldiers.

recommendations.title: G.I. Joe: The Rise of Cobra

recommendations.title: Age of Heroes
recommendations.overview: The true story of the formation of Ian Fleming's 30 Commando unit, a precursor for the elite forces in the U.K.

recommendations.title: Fury

recommendations.title: The Man with the Iron Heart
